loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_control , SUM(SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_approve_amount) AS C_AMOUNT, SUM(SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.total_old_loan+SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.total_oldint+ decode( sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status ,'1' ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , 0) ) AS C_OLDLOAN , SUM(SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.buy_share) AS C_SHARE, count(SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.loan_requestment_no) as c_loan, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b.member_group_name , sum(SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.fee_amount) as c_fee FROM SC_LON_M_CONTRACT , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a , SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST , sc_cnt_m_coop , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_no ) and ( SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_requestment_no = SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.loan_requestment_no ) and ( SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.MEMBERSHIP_NO = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_control = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b.member_group_no ) and ( SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.approve_status = '1' ) /*WHERE*/
GROUP BY sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_control , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b.member_group_name
